query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_008', 'Walk in Power', 'action', 'rare', 'order', 'fire', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 3, 0, 0, 'All friendly units gain +2 power until end of turn. If The Advocate is on the field, also gain +2 health.', 'We refuse to be diminished. Walk in power.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_008_walk_in_power-hG7axhSUTYfs5ESQpSmrcJ.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["empowerment","buff"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_009', 'The Queen of Truth', 'character', 'legendary', 'order', 'water', 'reality', 'oracle', 'human', NULL, 5, 4, 8, 'While on the field, all hidden information is revealed. Enemy cards in hand are visible. Immune to deception effects.', 'She is the keeper of all genuine history.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_009_queen_of_truth-74yamdyqZC66Zri9tTjAwh.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["truth","reveal"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_010', 'Civil War Eruption', 'event', 'epic', 'chaos', 'fire', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 4, 0, 0, 'All units on the field must attack another unit this turn. Units of the same faction deal double damage to each other.', 'The Insurgency fractures. Iron Lion and The Warlord — once brothers, now enemies.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_010_civil_war-2bvWV2D75QLRMP59VBqLk4.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["betrayal","chaos"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_011', 'Samsara Engine', 'item', 'epic', 'order', 'water', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 4, 0, 4, 'When a friendly unit is destroyed, return it to your hand at the end of the turn. Loses 1 durability each use.', 'Death and rebirth are not metaphors but literal mechanisms.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_011_samsara_engine-dkemZphtAFj3UUed4c5scg.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["rebirth","cycle"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_012', 'The Ocularum Activated', 'item', 'legendary', 'chaos', 'air', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 6, 0, 5, 'Reveal all cards in all hands and decks. For 3 turns, no cards can be played face-down. Enemy stealth units are revealed.', 'Total surveillance — every secret laid bare.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_012_ocularum-khTwEmBCJZKouNXeeem7Jn.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["surveillance","reveal"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl); INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, album, season, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('sih_013', 'No Savior Coming', 'action', 'rare', 'order', 'earth', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', NULL, 3, 0, 0, 'Disable all healing and resurrection effects for 3 turns. Units must fight with what they have.', 'No divine intervention. Only human will remains.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/sih_013_no_savior-c7QngmuxU9kbNFH76NoDrC.webp', 'Silence in Heaven', 'Season 2', '["denial","endurance"]', 'story', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE imageUrl=VALUES(imageUrl)
